text: Just got off the water — Luc texted about that hurricane forming in the Gulf. You seeing this? NOAA's already got a watch up for the western shelf.
Yeah been watching it all morning. They saying it could track toward the Panhandle by Thursday.
That's my whole week of charters if it does. Already had one guy call to reschedule. Can't blame him honestly.
What about Bayport? Y'all usually get the outer bands even on the weak ones.
We'll see. Diane wants me to pull the boat early but I'm giving it till tomorrow's 5am update before I decide anything.
Smart. Also did you catch that the bass tournament on the Suwannee got canceled? Something about algae bloom.
Heard that. Same thing happened two summers ago. Whole river looked like pea soup. Bad news for those guides up there.
Stay safe out there Carlos. Let me know what that morning report says — I'll help you tie down if it comes this way.
Bobby Ray posted that picture of the redfish he caught off Bayport last week — left a comment saying my charter put him on it 😄 You see it?

Luc did you see Tommy Hodge posted about catching a 40lb grouper out of Bayport? Man's been fishing these waters 20 years and still using the wrong rig 😄 Tell him come out on Lucky Strike, I'll show him how it's done.
Marcel did you see Luc's post about redfish season? Told him I'll have Lucky Strike ready by April, Bayport's been slow but the water's clearing up 🎣
Ashley sent me that post of Hector's — the one where he says he's never eating grouper again after seeing how it's caught 😂 Told him come out on Lucky Strike sometime, change his mind real quick.
Elise saw you liked Tommy's post about deep sea trips — tell him Lucky Strike runs grouper charters out of Bayport every weekend April through November. I'll give him the friend rate 🎣
Hey Beau, your uncle Luc posted that pic of the Lucky Strike from the Bayport dock and I want to say something under it. How do I reply without it blasting out to everybody I've ever met?
Luc posted that picture from last summer's flounder trip and Elise is right there holding her first catch. Had to share it — too good. Hope you saw it before the workshop ate my afternoon 😄
Hank you see Luc's post? Kid put up a pic of Elise on the Lucky Strike holding her first redfish. Had to say something, couldn't just scroll past that. 😄
Russ — you see that post Luc put up of the redfish he caught off the Lucky Strike last Sunday? Man's getting good. Thinking of leaving me a comment or just letting him think he got lucky 😄
Saw your post about the redfish bite off Chassahowitzka — Luc's been bugging me to take him out there all summer. Lucky Strike's booked solid through August but maybe we squeeze in a half day 🎣
Just got off the water — Luc texted about that hurricane forming in the Gulf. You seeing this? NOAA's already got a watch up for the western shelf.
Yeah been watching it all morning. They saying it could track toward the Panhandle by Thursday.
